---
title: "All Calculators"
subtitle: "Every interactive calculator and graphic in one slide stack"
description: "A single slide stack that brings together the graduate-student calculators and interactive graphics from across the site."
---

Use this page when you want to walk through the site's interactive tools without jumping between guides. The embedded sections below preserve the existing calculators and graphics in a single slide stack, and the linked pages still share stipend, city, savings, and duration values through the same browser storage.

---

## 1. How to Use This Stack

- Use the sidebar or slide footer controls to move through the full calculator stack.
- Each embedded section below opens the original page, so you can interact with the existing calculators and graphics in one place.
- If an embedded section feels cramped, use the **Open full section** button to jump directly to the source page.

---

## 2. 🗺️ University Cost-of-Living Map

<div style="display:grid;gap:12px;margin:12px 0 18px;">
  <p style="margin:0;opacity:.75;">Compare PhD stipends and MIT living wages across major graduate-school cities.</p>
  <p style="margin:0;"><a href="salary_and_cost_of_living.html#sec-university-map" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Open full section</a></p>
  <iframe src="salary_and_cost_of_living.html#sec-university-map" title="University Cost-of-Living Map" loading="lazy" style="width:100%;min-height:1320px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:#fff;"></iframe>
</div>

---

## 3. 🔢 Interactive Stipend Calculator

<div style="display:grid;gap:12px;margin:12px 0 18px;">
  <p style="margin:0;opacity:.75;">Adjust stipend, city, and program length, then review the linked purchasing-power and budget graphics.</p>
  <p style="margin:0;"><a href="salary_and_cost_of_living.html#sec-stipend-calculator" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Open full section</a></p>
  <iframe src="salary_and_cost_of_living.html#sec-stipend-calculator" title="Interactive Stipend Calculator" loading="lazy" style="width:100%;min-height:1480px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:#fff;"></iframe>
</div>

---

## 4. 📒 Monthly Budget Planner

<div style="display:grid;gap:12px;margin:12px 0 18px;">
  <p style="margin:0;opacity:.75;">Use the city-linked budget planner to estimate needs, wants, savings, and monthly cash flow.</p>
  <p style="margin:0;"><a href="wealth_building.html#sec-budget-template" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Open full section</a></p>
  <iframe src="wealth_building.html#sec-budget-template" title="Monthly Budget Planner" loading="lazy" style="width:100%;min-height:1360px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:#fff;"></iframe>
</div>

---

## 5. 💰 Wealth Building & Savings Goal Planner

<div style="display:grid;gap:12px;margin:12px 0 18px;">
  <p style="margin:0;opacity:.75;">Tie together savings rate, Roth IRA contributions, debt payments, and medium-term goals.</p>
  <p style="margin:0;"><a href="wealth_building.html#sec-budget-planner" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Open full section</a></p>
  <iframe src="wealth_building.html#sec-budget-planner" title="Wealth Building and Savings Goal Planner" loading="lazy" style="width:100%;min-height:1500px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:#fff;"></iframe>
</div>

---

## 6. 👶 Interactive Family Cost Calculator

<div style="display:grid;gap:12px;margin:12px 0 18px;">
  <p style="margin:0;opacity:.75;">Model childcare, child-related costs, and home-saving tradeoffs in the same family-planning workflow.</p>
  <p style="margin:0;"><a href="family_planning.html#sec-family-calculator" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Open full section</a></p>
  <iframe src="family_planning.html#sec-family-calculator" title="Interactive Family Cost Calculator" loading="lazy" style="width:100%;min-height:1540px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:#fff;"></iframe>
</div>

---

## 7. 💊 Preventive Health Value Estimator

<div style="display:grid;gap:12px;margin:12px 0 18px;">
  <p style="margin:0;opacity:.75;">Estimate the long-term avoided healthcare costs of common preventive habits.</p>
  <p style="margin:0;"><a href="health_insurance.html#sec-health-value" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Open full section</a></p>
  <iframe src="health_insurance.html#sec-health-value" title="Preventive Health Value Estimator" loading="lazy" style="width:100%;min-height:1160px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:#fff;"></iframe>
</div>

---

## 8. 💼 Interactive PhD ROI Calculator

<div style="display:grid;gap:12px;margin:12px 0 18px;">
  <p style="margin:0;opacity:.75;">Compare opportunity cost, break-even timing, and salary premiums across common post-PhD paths.</p>
  <p style="margin:0;"><a href="career_roi.html#sec-roi-calculator" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-primary">Open full section</a></p>
  <iframe src="career_roi.html#sec-roi-calculator" title="Interactive PhD ROI Calculator" loading="lazy" style="width:100%;min-height:1400px;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color,#dee2e6);border-radius:12px;background:#fff;"></iframe>
</div>
